title: ApiTokenDto
description: A Coscine API token used for Bearer authentication against the Coscine Web API. Derived from the Coscine Web API OpenAPI description (ApiTokenDto).

id.description: The unique identifier of the API token.

name.description: The name associated with the API token.

creationDate.description: The date when the API token was created.

expiryDate.description: The expiry date of the API token.

token.description: The actual token value used for authentication.

owner.description: The owner of the API token (UserMinimalDto).
